zh.lifeSummary: Anne Stainsby於1200年出生在英國哈普爾。她於大約1225年與Baron Bernard Brocas在英國哈普爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1250年在她的家鄉享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stainsby
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Stains, Stains, and by, a dwelling, meaning the habitation of Stains

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Anne Stainsby was born in 1200, in Hampshire, England. She married Baron Bernard Brocas about 1225, in Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1250, in her hometown, at the age of 51.
